evals.prompt:
Crear post para Instagram y LinkedIn:

youtube-link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
tono: educativo
objetivo: engagement
idioma: en
dry-run: si
evals.expected_output: Full flow runs for both platforms. Posts are written in English. Step 3 is skipped (tono + objetivo already resolved). Step 6 shows approval block with dry-run notice. After approval, Step 8 shows dry-run summary — no publish call made. Status lines use only [ok], [...], [aviso], [listo] tags.

assertions.name: trigger-fires
assertions.description: Skill activates on the exact command format and runs the full flow

assertions.name: step3-skipped
assertions.description: No tone/objective questions asked — both were provided in the command

assertions.name: posts-in-english
assertions.description: Both LinkedIn and Instagram posts are written in English (idioma: en)

assertions.name: dry-run-no-publish
assertions.description: bc.publish_post is never called; Step 8 shows 'dry-run (no se envió)' for both platforms

assertions.name: approval-gate-shown
assertions.description: Step 6 approval block is displayed before any publish action

assertions.name: status-tags-normalized
assertions.description: All status lines use only [...], [ok], [aviso], [error], [cancelado], [listo] — no checkmarks or uppercase WARNING/DONE

evals.prompt:
Crear post para Instagram y LinkedIn:

youtube-link: https://youtu.be/9bZkp7q19f0
solo: linkedin
tono-linkedin: personal
objetivo-linkedin: trafico
dry-run: si
evals.expected_output: Only LinkedIn flow runs. Instagram block is omitted from Step 6 and Step 8. Short youtu.be URL is accepted. No tone/objective questions asked. Step 6 shows only LinkedIn block. Dry-run: no publish call.

assertions.name: solo-linkedin-respected
assertions.description: Instagram steps (visuals, post writing, publishing) are entirely skipped

assertions.name: youtu-be-url-handled
assertions.description: Short youtu.be URL is accepted and processed without error

assertions.name: step3-skipped
assertions.description: No tone/objective questions asked — both provided via tono-linkedin / objetivo-linkedin

assertions.name: approval-shows-only-linkedin
assertions.description: Step 6 approval block contains only the LinkedIn section

assertions.name: dry-run-no-publish
assertions.description: No publish call made; Step 8 summary shows LinkedIn dry-run status only

evals.prompt:
Crear post para Instagram y LinkedIn:

youtube-link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XXXINVALIDXXX
evals.expected_output: Extraction fails. Skill prints [aviso] and falls back to WebFetch for the title. If WebFetch also fails, skill stops gracefully with a clear error message. No post content is invented or hallucinated.

assertions.name: graceful-extraction-failure
assertions.description: Extraction failure is caught and communicated with [aviso] tag, not a raw exception

assertions.name: no-hallucinated-content
assertions.description: Skill does not invent post content when video cannot be extracted

assertions.name: fallback-attempted
assertions.description: Skill attempts the bare ?v= URL retry and/or WebFetch fallback before stopping

assertions.name: user-guided-on-error
assertions.description: Error message explains what went wrong and suggests a next step (check URL, try another video)
